panel.search_placeholder: Search shortcuts, keys, categories, or actions…

keyboard.layout_edit_hint: Choose the physical keyboard shown by the editor.
keyboard.select_hint: Select modifiers, then click a key to inspect that combination.
keyboard.free_hint: This combination is not used in the currently selected layer.

creator.open: Create a new keybinding in the current view
creator.title: Create keybinding
creator.release_unavailable: Niri does not support release-triggered keybindings.
creator.list_hint: Choose modifiers and enter the key or comma-separated key sequence. You can also create shortcuts from the keyboard view.
creator.hyprland_hint: Hyprland supports one or more ordinary keys. Click selected keys again to remove them.
creator.niri_hint: Niri supports one ordinary key and triggers bindings on press.
creator.mangowc_hint: MangoWC supports one ordinary key and can trigger on press or release.

errors.conflict_blocked: This combination is already occupied. Choose a free combination.
errors.combination_required: Select at least one ordinary key.
errors.library_arguments_required: Replace every command-library placeholder before saving.
errors.library_entry_invalid: The selected native action no longer matches the command library.
errors.invalid_command_kind: The selected command type is not supported.
errors.native_update_unsupported: Existing shortcuts cannot be converted to native actions safely.
errors.single_key_only: This compositor supports only one ordinary key per shortcut.
errors.release_unsupported: This compositor does not support release-triggered shortcuts.
errors.invalid_request: The writer received an invalid request.
errors.invalid_compositor: The active compositor is not supported by the writer.
errors.invalid_operation: The requested shortcut operation is not supported.
errors.unsupported_compositor: The active compositor is not supported by the writer.
errors.source_unreadable: The main compositor configuration could not be read.
errors.source_changed: The main configuration changed while the shortcut was being prepared. Refresh and try again.
errors.target_changed: This shortcut changed on disk. Refresh the list before editing it again.
errors.target_not_found: This shortcut is no longer present in the current configuration.
errors.target_not_hidden: This shortcut is no longer present in the hidden shortcuts list.
errors.anchor_not_found: The destination shortcut is no longer present. Refresh and try again.
errors.anchor_ambiguous: The destination shortcut could not be identified uniquely.
errors.anchor_changed: The destination shortcut changed on disk. Refresh and try again.
errors.anchor_range_invalid: The destination shortcut source location is no longer valid.
errors.different_source: These shortcuts are stored in different files and cannot be reordered safely.
errors.target_anchor_overlap: The source ranges of these shortcuts overlap and cannot be reordered safely.
errors.target_not_editable: This shortcut is generated dynamically or its source syntax cannot be edited safely.
errors.hidden_block_invalid: The hidden shortcut block is incomplete or damaged, so it was left unchanged.
errors.target_range_invalid: The shortcut source location is no longer valid. Refresh the list and try again.
errors.description_not_editable: The description in this shortcut cannot be changed safely.
errors.command_not_editable: The command in this shortcut cannot be changed safely.
errors.activation_not_editable: The activation mode in this shortcut cannot be changed safely.
errors.category_edit_separate: Moving shortcuts between categories will be available in the category editor.
errors.managed_file_changed: The generated shortcuts file changed while the shortcut was being prepared. Refresh and try again.
errors.source_is_managed_file: Select the main compositor configuration, not the generated shortcuts file.
errors.stale_context: The compositor configuration changed while the creator was open. Refresh and reopen the creator.
errors.symlink_unsupported: The main or managed configuration is a symbolic link. Saving is blocked to preserve the link safely.
errors.preflight_failed: The configuration safety check could not be started.
errors.invalid_text: The category, description, and command must be single-line text without control characters.
errors.category_invalid: The category name contains characters unsupported by the compositor format.
errors.category_exists: Another category already uses this name.
errors.category_changed: The category changed while its editor was open. Refresh and try again.
errors.stale_category: The category changed while its editor was open. Refresh and try again.
errors.category_not_found: This category is no longer present in the current configuration.
errors.category_not_editable: This category contains generated, grouped, or otherwise read-only shortcuts and cannot be renamed safely.
errors.category_ambiguous: The category could not be identified uniquely in the current snapshot.
errors.category_ranges_overlap: The category contains overlapping source ranges and cannot be renamed safely.
errors.mango_command_hash_unsupported: MangoWC commands containing # are not supported by this first writer version.
errors.file_too_large: The managed keybinding file is too large.
errors.managed_file_too_large: The managed keybinding file is too large.
errors.managed_file_invalid: The managed keybinding file has an invalid structure.
errors.managed_file_unreadable: The managed keybinding file could not be read.
errors.managed_file_collision: A file with the managed filename already exists and does not belong to this plugin.
errors.managed_include_invalid: The managed include block in the main configuration is incomplete or damaged.
errors.write_failed: The managed keybinding file could not be written.
errors.managed_write_failed: The managed keybinding file could not be written.
errors.managed_rename_failed: The managed keybinding file could not be installed atomically.
errors.managed_temporary_collision: A safe temporary filename could not be allocated.
errors.integrate_failed: The managed file could not be included from the main configuration.
errors.source_write_failed: The managed file could not be included from the main configuration.
errors.source_rename_failed: The main configuration could not be updated atomically.
errors.source_temporary_collision: A safe temporary filename could not be allocated.
errors.verify_failed: The compositor rejected the generated configuration.
errors.verify_timeout: Configuration validation timed out; no changes were kept.
errors.verify_start_failed: Configuration validation could not be started; no changes were kept.
errors.validator_unavailable: The compositor validation command is unavailable; no changes were kept.
errors.reload_failed: The compositor rejected the reload, so the previous configuration was restored.
errors.reload_timeout: Reloading the compositor timed out, so the previous configuration was restored.
errors.reload_start_failed: Reloading the compositor could not be started, so the previous configuration was restored.
errors.rollback_failed: The shortcut could not be saved and the automatic rollback was incomplete. Check the compositor configuration files.
errors.recovery_reload_failed: The previous files were restored, but reloading the restored compositor configuration also failed.
errors.busy: Another shortcut is currently being saved. Try again in a moment.

command_library.title: Known commands
command_library.open_hint: Browse Noctalia commands and native actions for the active compositor
command_library.placeholder_hint: Replace every placeholder in double braces before saving.

editor.open_hint: Show shortcut and category edit controls
editor.drag: Drag this shortcut to another category
editor.hide: Hide this shortcut by commenting it out in the source file
editor.confirm_delete: Click again to confirm permanent deletion
editor.confirm_delete_hidden: Click again to permanently delete this hidden shortcut
editor.hidden_hint: These shortcuts are inactive. Restore one to put its exact source text back, or delete it permanently.
editor.title: Edit keybinding
editor.hint: Update the combination, description, command, trigger mode, or category.
editor.moved: The keybinding was moved to the selected category.
editor.category_read_only: This category contains generated, grouped, or read-only shortcuts and cannot be renamed safely
editor.hidden: The keybinding was hidden and can be restored from the editor.
editor.read_only: This entry is generated dynamically or cannot be edited safely.
editor.native_command: This shortcut uses a native compositor action. Its action is preserved; only supported fields can be changed.

panel.open_config_folder: Open the current keybinding file's folder
panel.config_folder_unavailable: No readable keybinding source is available yet.
panel.xdg_open_unavailable: xdg-open is not installed or is not available on PATH.
panel.config_folder_failed: The keybinding folder could not be opened.
panel.settings_failed: Noctalia settings could not be opened.
panel.path_hint: If Keymap cannot find your keybindings automatically, open Keymap settings and enter the correct compositor configuration file path.
panel.loading_hint: Reading keybindings from the active compositor and its configuration.
panel.unknown_error: The service returned an unknown error.

warning_count.one: One parser warning occurred. The list may be incomplete.
warning_count.other: {count} parser warnings occurred. The list may be incomplete.

errors.unknown: The service returned an unknown error.
errors.hyprctl_not_found: hyprctl is not installed or is not available on PATH.
errors.hyprctl_timeout: Hyprland did not answer before the request timed out.
errors.hyprctl_failed: Hyprland rejected the request for live keybindings.
errors.hyprctl_start_failed: The hyprctl process could not be started.
errors.compositor_unknown: No supported compositor could be detected. Select one manually in the plugin settings.
errors.niri_config_unreadable: The configured Niri KDL file could not be read.
errors.niri_required_include_missing: A required Niri include could not be read. Fix the configuration path and try again.
errors.niri_no_binds: No active keybindings were found in the Niri configuration.
errors.mangowc_config_unreadable: The configured MangoWC file could not be read.
errors.mangowc_required_source_missing: A required MangoWC source could not be read. Fix the configuration path and try again.
errors.mangowc_no_binds: No keybindings were found in the MangoWC configuration.

panel.empty_hint: No shortcuts were found automatically. Open Keymap settings, enter the correct compositor configuration file path, and refresh the panel.
panel.no_results_hint: Try a different description, key, category, or dispatcher.

compositor.label: Compositor
compositor.description: Detect the active compositor automatically or select one manually.

hyprland_config.label: Hyprland Lua configuration
hyprland_config.description: Main Lua configuration file. Required modules are discovered from this file.

niri_config.label: Niri configuration
niri_config.description: Main KDL configuration file. Include nodes are followed recursively.

mangowc_config.label: MangoWC configuration
mangowc_config.description: Main config.conf file. Source directives are followed recursively.

merge_sequential.label: Merge sequential shortcuts
merge_sequential.description: Combine related numbered shortcuts, such as workspaces 1–9, into one row.

show_undescribed.label: Show shortcuts without descriptions
show_undescribed.description: Include Hyprland shortcuts without explicit descriptions. Niri and MangoWC use generated action descriptions.

keyboard_layout.label: Default keyboard size
keyboard_layout.description: Physical keyboard layout used when opening the Keymap keyboard view.

columns.label: Panel columns
columns.description: Number of category columns shown in the Keymap panel.

card_color.label: Category card color
card_color.description: Background role or custom color used for category cards.

category_color.label: Category heading color
category_color.description: Theme role or custom color used for category headings.

description_color.label: Description color
description_color.description: Theme role or custom color used for shortcut descriptions.

modifier_color.description: Theme role or custom background color for this modifier.

modifier_text_color.description: Theme role or custom text color for this modifier.

key_color.label: Key background
key_color.description: Theme role or custom background color for non-modifier keys.

key_text_color.label: Key text
key_text_color.description: Theme role or custom text color for non-modifier keys.

show_label.label: Show label
show_label.description: Show the plugin name next to the bar glyph.
